title: Live OpenAlex source acquisition resilience
problem: Live staged proofs failed when rank-1 publisher landing pages returned HTTP 403; enqueue preferred landing_page_url over OA routes and fetch attempted only one URL.
acceptance_criteria: Deterministic OA-first URL candidate ordering on enqueue.
fetch-candidate retries across URL routes on 403/401/406/timeout.
Structured failure reasons and selected_url_kind/attempted_urls diagnostics.
Top-N fetch helper for live proofs; default CI remains network-free.
non_goals: Decoupling mock-spine proofs from fixture phrases (ticket-234).
rollback_plan: Revert migration 0008 column usage; restore single-URL fetch.
